long_description:
Affected support: Onsite Resource Availability - Team Coverage Withdrawn (Night) - MAD02
Location: mad02
Ensuring Shift Coverage in MAD02 for the evening shift from 16:00 to  23:30 (local time) due to MEF
short_description: Onsite Resource Availability - Team Coverage Withdrawn (Evening) - MAD02
close_notes: Site Unattended - Manager on call for Sev1 issues
current_status_next_steps: MAD04 and MAD05 are watching the queues and will call the manager if any sev1  issue might arise. Manager is on call
